question: What is the app's headline output metric?
options: Probability of not running out of money through life expectancy via Monte Carlo
Single deterministic projection of net worth
context: Depends on decision 479caa25-9bd3-4c4b-9c76-ef25468d42c6 (core jobs). Excel model runs 10000 Monte Carlo trials and reports P(assets>0) at checkpoint ages; user states the main question is 'will I run out of money in retirement and how to avoid it'.
